summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: derive x = A^(-1) v from Ax = v via 4-line sequence. Line 1: Ax=v. Line 2: A^(-1) A x = A^(-1) v with 'apply A^(-1) both sides' note. Line 3: I x = A^(-1) v with brace showing A^(-1) A = I. Line 4: x = A^(-1) v boxed in YELLOW. Color coding: PINK x, YELLOW v, GREEN A^(-1), BLUE I.
